upasargachandrika.example_text: 'avatIrya saraH svargI saMsprazwumupacakrame' (rA0 77716) saMsprazwum=upasprazwum=Acamitum anyatra durlaBo'trArTe samaH prayogaH
'yAsyatyadya Sakuntaleti hfdayaM saMspfzwamutkaRWayA' (SA0 45) saMspfzwam aBiBUtam
'duHspfzwaSceti vijYeya lfkAraH pluta eva ca' (pA0 SikzA0 5) duHspfzwaH=IzatspfzwaprayatnaH yaRgfhyate taTABUtalakzaRaH
'ya ete (akzare) nispfSet vajraM nispfSet' (jE0 brA0 1113)
'antataH pratyupaspfSya SucirBavati' (drA0 gf0 1112 go0 gf0 1228) pratyupaspfSya punarupaspfSyA''camya
'amUM dyAM varzmaRopa spfSAmi' (f0 101257) upaspfSAmi samyak spfSAmi AmfSAmi
'adBi prARAnupaspfSet' (manu0 4143) pARigfhItABiradBiScakzurAdIni karaRAni spfSedityarTaH
'yatrAsyApa upaspfSanti agnO hyaDi BrAtfvyaM varDayet' (Sa0 brA0 11121) upaspfSanti spfSanti upaSabdo nAntaramarTe karoti
'sa vihvalANgo jagatImupAspfSat' (BA0 Salya0 5766)
'rakzyamARaSca tErviprErnahi BUmimupAspfSam' (BA0 u0 18213) ukto'rTaH
'nAkAraRamupaspfSet striyam' (satyA0 SrO0 26267) pUrveRa samo'rTaH
'…api pApakfto janAn nopaspfSanti vE viGnA yamadUtASca dAruRAH' (skanda0 kA0 419121)..
'vAso yat patnIBirutaM tannaH syonamupa spfSAt' (aTarva0 14251)

'svapne kzavaTO… aprayataM ca manuzyaM nIvIM ca pariDAyApa upaspfSet' (satyA0 SrO0 26513) apa upaspfSet kezucitsnAnaM kezucidAcamanaM kezucitsparSanamAtraM (kuryAt) yAvatA prayato manyata iti vfttikAraH sAraM vacaH sUtrahfdayamuttAnayati
'pAdAvupaspfSya SanEH prahfzwo vAkyamabravIt' (BA0 anu0 3054) upaspfSya spfzwvA
'upaspfSya dvijo nityamannamadyAt samAhitaH' (manu0 253) upaspfSya Acamya
'SvoBUte udakamupanpfSya vAcaM visfjet' (Apa0 Da0 21213) udakamupaspfSya snAtvA aBizekaM kftvA
'upaspfSya maRikarRikAyAm' (daSaku0 pf0 95) ukto'rTaH
'nadImupasprazwumivAvatIrRaH' (paYcarA0 115) upasprazwuM snAtum
'upasprazwugataScAhamapaSyaM SayitAmimAm' (BA0 Adi0 7213) upasprazwumAhnikajalakAryaM kartumiti nIlakaRWaH
'pratigfhRAtyenAnaSakya upasparSanam' (kA0 SrO0 51017) upasparSanaM sparSanam enAn hutAvaSizwAn puroqASAn
'brAhmaRasya gOriti padopasparSanaM varjayet' (Apa0 Da0 1316) ukto'rTaH
'SvacARqAlapatitopasparSane sacElaM snAtaH sadyaH prayato Bavati' (va0 Darma0 2333)
'avaraScedvarRaH pUrvaM varRamupaspfSetpUrvo vA'varaM tatra tacCavoktamASOcam' (yAjYa0 mitAkzarAyAM 314 ityatrodDftaM gOtamIyaM vacanam ) upasparSanaM nirharaRamiti mitAkzarA
'meDAM mahyamiti pARinA mArgaM dattvA trizavaRamahorAtramudakopasparSanam' (lO0 gf0 418) udakopasparSanaM snAnam

'upasparSanazaqBAgaM laBate puruzaH sadA' (BA0 anu0 6513) upasparSanaM dAnam RijaDikasya spfSerayaM prayoga iti gAH sparSayatA GawoGnIriti raGukArasya vacanAtpratIyate sa BavAMstUpaM na prayuNkte kevalena DAtunA dAnamarTamarpayati
'tadupasparSanaM puRyaM gacCantaM… BaradvAjam' (rA0 5314) upasparSanaM snAnam
'vratAyopasparSanaM svAsane' (kA0 SrO0 7427) upasparSanamAcamanam
'asme tA ta indra santu satyA'hiMsatIrupaspfSaH' (f0 102213) upagamya spfSanti upaspfSaH stutayaH
